displayText.headline: Welcome to Luxurious Wilderness
displayText.subheading: Dive into nature's lap with upscale amenities.

style: Asymmetric left-aligned text layout, minimal background
description: The ad employs a Swiss Grid style with the headline occupying the top left, followed by neatly aligned text blocks that communicate the offer and subheading below it. The background is a subtle overlay of lush green scenery to complement the text.
